theme_description: A podcast and audio collection site.

title.label: Title
title.info: Episode title displayed above the content

episode_number.label: Episode number
episode_number.info: Shown as a prefix before the title (e.g. 5)

audio_url.label: Audio URL
audio_url.info: Direct URL to the audio file (mp3, m4a, etc.)

audio_asset.label: Audio asset
audio_asset.info: Pick an asset from DAM. If set, it overrides Audio URL.

channel.name: Channel
channel.description: A channel page that lists its episodes.

index_list.name: Home (list)
index_list.description: List-style home with search and tag filters.

index_card.name: Home (cards)
index_card.description: Card grid home with sorting by publish date.

index_v2.name: Home (macOS Podcasts)
index_v2.description: Two-pane home inspired by macOS Podcasts with Up Next and show grid.

channel_v2.name: Channel (macOS Podcasts)
channel_v2.description: Channel page with hero band and episode list, macOS Podcasts style.

page_v2.name: Episode (macOS Podcasts)
page_v2.description: Episode detail page styled like macOS Podcasts.

show_episode_cover.label: Show episode cover
show_episode_cover.info: When enabled, shows a 1:1 cover in list rows and on the episode page header.

header_html.label: Sidebar listen links HTML
header_html.info: Custom sidebar HTML for Spotify, Apple Podcasts, RSS, etc.

head_html.label: Custom HTML in <head></head> tags
head_html.info: Supports HTML tags and limited TailwindCSS style code
head_html.placeholder: Usually used for analytics, customer service bot, etc.
